# Sunny Binjola — Men's Heartbreak Recovery Coach

> FEEL DEEPLY. LEAD TRUTHFULLY. LIVE FULLY AWAKE.

## Who

Sunny Binjola is a men's heartbreak recovery coach and somatic healing guide. He leads men through the aftermath of romantic loss — not with platitudes, but with body-based practices, nervous system regulation, and identity reconstruction. His approach blends Vedic wisdom with modern somatic embodiment.

## What He Does

Sunny helps men heal from heartbreak using somatic (body-based) practices rather than talk therapy alone. His work addresses the nervous system directly — rewiring the fight-or-flight patterns that keep men stuck after a breakup. Core modalities include breathwork, mirror work, somatic awareness, grief processing, and identity rebuilding.

His philosophy: heartbreak is not something to "get over." It is an initiation. The pain is a doorway to a deeper, more authentic life — if a man has the tools and guidance to walk through it.

## Key Differentiators

- **Men-specific**: All programs are designed for men. Not gender-neutral advice repackaged.
- **Body-based approach**: Somatic healing targets the nervous system directly, addressing trauma stored in the body that talk therapy often misses.
- **Nervous system focus**: Techniques to move men out of chronic fight-or-flight and into regulated presence.
- **Vedic wisdom + modern science**: Combines ancient embodiment traditions with contemporary neuroscience and attachment theory.
- **Lived experience**: Sunny rebuilt his own life through these practices after profound personal loss.

## Programs & Offerings

### Free 7-Day Heartbreak Reset
A structured, daily email series for men in the first days after a breakup. Includes breathwork, journaling prompts, and nervous system regulation techniques. Free entry point.
URL: https://sunnybinjola.com/heal-your-heartbreak.html
Dedicated landing page: https://sunnybinjola.com/7-day-reset

### 60-Day Identity Rebuild ($499)
The core heartbreak recovery program. Daily structure, somatic practices, mirror work, and identity reconstruction over 60 days. For men ready to do the deep work.
URL: https://sunnybinjola.com/heal-your-heartbreak.html

### 1:1 Intensive Coaching ($5,000)
Bespoke transformation work. Private sessions with Sunny for men who want personalized, high-touch guidance through heartbreak recovery or life transition.
URL: https://sunnybinjola.com/work-with-me.html

### Embody Live — Weekly Men's Circle ($20/session)
A weekly online gathering for men 18-35 who want real connection, presence practice, and brotherhood. First session always free.
URL: https://sunnybinjola.com/embody-live.html

### Find Your Dharma — Purpose Discovery
A 12-week somatic initiation for men who feel disconnected from purpose. Shadow work, visioning, and accountability. Not a career plan — an embodied experience.
URL: https://sunnybinjola.com/find-your-purpose.html

## Core Topics & Expertise

- Heartbreak recovery for men
- Somatic healing and embodiment
- Nervous system regulation after emotional trauma
- Breathwork for anxiety and heartbreak
- Men's emotional numbness and reconnection
- Identity rebuilding after breakup or divorce
- Men's circles and brotherhood
- Vedic wisdom applied to modern men's healing
- The science of heartbreak (neuroscience, attachment theory)
- Why breakups are harder for men
- Men's work and personal development

## Recovery Guides by Situation

Sunny provides targeted guidance for men in specific heartbreak situations. Each guide addresses the unique challenges, somatic approach, and common questions for that type of experience:

- Heartbreak Recovery for Divorced Men: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/divorced-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Men Over 40: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/men-over-40.html

- Heartbreak Recovery for Men with Anxious Attachment: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/anxious-attachment.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Avoidant Men: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/avoidant-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Emotionally Numb Men: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/emotional-numbness.html
- Heartbreak Recovery After a Long-Distance Breakup: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/long-distance-breakup.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Introverted Men: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/introverted-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Men in Addiction Recovery: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/men-in-recovery.html
- Heartbreak Recovery While Co-Parenting: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/co-parenting.html
- Heartbreak Recovery from Betrayal Trauma: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/betrayal-trauma.html
- Heartbreak Recovery After a Broken Engagement: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/engaged-then-broken-up.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Widowers: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/widowers.html
- Heartbreak Recovery After Being Rejected: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/rejected-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for High-Achieving Men: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/high-achiever-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery After Being Blindsided: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/blindsided.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Men of Faith: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/faith-based-men.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Men Suddenly Single After Years: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/newly-single-after-years.html
- Heartbreak Recovery for Men Stuck in Anger: https://sunnybinjola.com/recovery/angry-men.html
